item.description:
## What's Changed

- Transcript segments now use lazy rendering, reducing layout work when switching into large recordings with many transcript rows.
- Transcript loads now ignore stale/cancelled responses when users switch recordings quickly, so network delays do not disturb the newly selected recording.
- Added environment-gated performance diagnostics via `RECAPPI_PERF_LOG=1` with `[RecappiPerf]` logs that report counts and durations only.

## Validation

- `swift test` passed: 82/82 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Local stable-signed `./scripts/build-app.sh` passed.
- `codesign -dvv build/RecappiMini.app` confirmed `Authority=RecappiMini Dev`.
- Perf logs showed selection-to-first-render mostly in the 5-18ms range after lazy rendering; remaining slow paths were network transcript loads rather than render/layout work.

## Known Limitations / Follow-up

- Transcript cache TTL/background refresh behavior is unchanged and may be tuned separately.
